_description: Knowledge base for endo-transcribe transcription. Updated after each patient run.

confirmed.CT: Calcitonin (in lab context) / CT scan (in imaging context)

notes.ΜΕΔΙΘΥΡΟΝ: Greek brand of levothyroxine. Post-thyroidectomy replacement. Typical doses: 25-200 μg. Written as Μεδιθυρον in handwriting.

seen: ΟΛΙΚΗ ΥΣΤΕΡΕΚΤΟΜΗ ΜΕΤ ΩΟΘΗΚΩΝ (total hysterectomy with oophorectomy)

corrections.reason: Timeline inconsistency: CT 24/11/21, Echo 26/11/21, surgery 17/01/22 all precede the visit if dated 2022. Handwriting 1↔2 confusion confirmed.
Pathology confirmed papillary (not medullary) microcarcinoma. CT 9.0 is consistent; CT 90 would suggest medullary type.
Normal PTH (28.16) suggests parathyroid preservation. Ca 9.6 mg/dL is normal and consistent.

hallucination_warnings: Clinical exam items: AI tends to fill in plausible-sounding exam findings. Verify every line against the image.
Lab normal ranges: AI may insert textbook ranges that differ from the lab's actual ranges. Always read from image.
Medication dosages: Standard dosages may be hallucinated. Read exact values from handwriting.

notes: Dense, small handwriting especially in imaging findings sections
Greek letters well-formed but closely spaced
Year digits 1 and 2 can be confused
Pathology report section has dense medical terminology
